title: Crispy Keto Taco Stacks
description: A twist on traditional tacos, this stack uses crispy taco shells filled with cheese and served hot, perfect for a keto meal.

ingredients.name: Taco Meat (seasoned ground beef or chicken)

instructions: Bake taco shells for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
In a skillet, cook taco meat over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Shred the Monterey Jack cheese and set aside.
To assemble the tacos, place a few spoonfuls of taco meat onto a baked taco shell.
Top with shredded cheese and a sprinkle of Mexican Jack cheese.
